name: Black Mountain Kings
short_description: You were thrown in a strange world. You are alone, and you got nothing. What to do next? You decide it! Explore, defeat monsters, get riches, learn new abilities, discover secrets, and learn the truth.
detailed_description:
You find yourself in an unfamiliar place. Apparently you are a monster hunter. You don't have anything. The world feels strange.

What do you do next?


Black Mountain Kings is a non-linear action RPG focused on combat.




  • Open World - You're free to explore all major areas of the game from the very beginning.

  • Fast-Paced and Varied Combat - Do you want to cast powerful spells? Destroy your enemies with your own fists? Maybe you just want to heal your allies while they fight for you? Every play style is viable.

  • Customizable Class - Your starting class is just a starting point. You can learn dozens of new skills that complement your preferred play style.

  • Unrestricted Equipment - There are no class, level, nor stats restrictions. If you find a new piece of equipment, you'll be able to use it.

  • Several Party Members - The world of Black Moutain Kings is dangerous. But it is a lot less dangerous if you have some allies.

  • Secrets - There are secrets everywhere.
